wins: Raised guidance for 2026 operational sales to 5.9% to 6.9%
ICOTYDE launched with strong early demand and positioned as first-line systemic therapy
TECNIS PureSee received FDA approval, offering extended depth of focus intraocular lens
DARZALEX and CARVYKTI showed strong growth with double-digit sales increases
VARIPULSE Pro launched in Europe with 5x faster ablation
risks: STEHLARA headwinds impacted growth in Innovative Medicine
Competitive pressures in U.S. surgical markets
Potential impact from volume-based procurement in China for electrophysiology products
